name: Sauteed Abalone
recipeInstructions:
1. Tenderize the abalone steaks by pounding with a wooden mallet until flattened to about one-quarter inch thickness.
2. Pat the abalone dry.
3. Melt the butter and oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. When the butter foams and is very hot, add the steaks.
5. Fry the steaks for 30 seconds on each side.
6. Transfer to a warm platter.
7. Drizzle with lemon juice and garnish with parsley.
